headline: Musk says Tesla's mega AI chip fab project to launch in seven days
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk said on Saturday that the company's Terafab project to make artificial ‌intelligence chips will launch in seven days.  Musk had said ‌last year that Tesla probably will have to build "a gigantic chip fab" ​to make artificial intelligence chips.  Tesla is designing its fifth-generation AI chip to power its autonomous ambitions, and Musk at the company's annual meeting last year laid out potential manufacturing plans.

content.title: Musk says Tesla's mega AI chip fab project to launch in seven days
content.summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk said on Saturday that the company's Terafab project to make artificial ‌intelligence chips will launch in seven days.  Musk had said ‌last year that Tesla probably will have to build "a gigantic chip fab" ​to make artificial intelligence chips.  Tesla is designing its fifth-generation AI chip to power its autonomous ambitions, and Musk at the company's annual meeting last year laid out potential manufacturing plans.
